title: campanula dalmatica
intro: Campanula dalmatica, also known as Dalmatian bellflower, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Balkan Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant's health benefits include relieving symptoms of colds and flu, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. In herbal preparations, the flowers and leaves of Campanula dalmatica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
